response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains (fintech, ad-tech, GIS, direct mail) with strong fundamentals in TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or growth/measurement infrastructure — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. While the Dunnhumby/Sociomantic experience with high-throughput data systems is relevant, there's no evidence of architecting standardized experimentation frameworks or leading multi-team growth initiatives at the scale expected for IC6.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) with high-scale systems at Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, mentoring via workshops and talks
Demonstrated systems thinking via open-source platform (GISCollective) and AI-agent/MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing infrastructure
No evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-org influence or leading multi-workstream growth initiatives
Title progression (Senior/Staff) and scope of impact appear below IC6 expectations for a hyperscaler growth role

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and polyglot breadth
